zh.lifeSummary: 當Christiana Bustard於1500年出生在英國奧可福爾阿德波利時，她的父親John Bustard42歲，母親Elizabeth Fox36歲。她於1543年與William Bury在英國奧可福爾結婚。她去世於1594年在英國可瓦爾安東尼享年94歲。

nameMeanings.name: Bustard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English bustarde ‘bustard’ (a large, heavily built bird, the males of which engage in spectacular courtship displays), from Old French bistarde, bustarde. There has been some confusion with Busteed .

variants.name: Busteed
meanings: Irish (Cork): unexplained. This surname is found almost exclusively in County Cork, having been recorded there since the first half of the 17th century; it may be of English origin.

nameMeanings.name: Christiana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval learned feminine form of Christian . As a recent revival it represents an elaborated form of Christina . It is also sometimes spelled Christianna , under the influence of the name Anna .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Christiana Bustard was born in 1500, in Adderbury, Oxfordshire, England, her father, John Bustard, was 42 and her mother, Elizabeth Fox, was 36. She married William Bury in 1543, in Oxfordshire, England. She died in 1594, in Antony, Cornwall, England, at the age of 94.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christiana Bustard est née en 1500, à Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Bustard, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Fox, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé William Bury en 1543, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Elle est décédée en 1594, à Antony, Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 94 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Christiana Bustard(이)가 1500년 영국 스퍼드실르 애더버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Bustard(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Fox(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1543년 영국 스퍼드실르에서 William Bury(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1594년 영국 코른월 앤토니에서 94세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christiana Bustard родилась в 1500 г. в местности аддирбури, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Bustard было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Fox, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Bury в 1543 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия. Она умерла в 1594 г. в местности антони, корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 94 лет.
